title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: iftop bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for iftop is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: iftop does for network usage what top(1) does for CPU usage. It listens to network traffic on a named interface and displays a table of current bandwidth usage by pairs of hosts. Handy for answering the question "why is our ADSL link so slow?".Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Packages missing from RHEL Extensions (JIRA:RHEL-127420)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for iftop is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

iftop does for network usage what top(1) does for CPU usage. It listens to network traffic on a named interface and displays a table of current bandwidth usage by pairs of hosts. Handy for answering the question "why is our ADSL link so slow?".Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Packages missing from RHEL Extensions (JIRA:RHEL-127420)
